(Attachments: # 1 Exhibit(s) Certificate of Good Standing, # 2 Proposed Order) (Hurst, Michael) (Entered: 04/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #167 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914

entry.title: Entry #166 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court DENIES OpenAI's Motion to Compel Discovery (ECF No. 146 ) and DENIES Plaintiffs' request for attorney fees. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 2/27/2026) (saw) Modified docket text on 3/2/2026 (saw). (Entered: 02/27/2026)

entry.title: Entry #163 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 162 Response/Objection (Redacted) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #162 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: RESPONSE filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re: 146 MOTION to Compel and for Appropriate Remedy (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #161 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed ORDER: Before the Court is the Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of the Opposition to the OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel that Plaintiffs filed February 11, 2026. ECF No. 157 . The Court GRANTS the Motion. Plaintiffs shall file a redacted copy of their opposition as they have requested. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 2/20/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #160 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is Plaintiffs X Corp. and X.AI LLC's Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of the Opposition to the OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel and for Appropriate Relief. ECF No. 157 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is referred to Judge Ray. Motion(s) referred to Magistrate Judge Mark Pittman. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 2/11/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/11/2026)

entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 158 Response/Objection (Redacted) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 02/11/2026)

entry.title: Entry #157 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of the Opposition to the OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel and for Appropriate Relief (Sealed pursuant to motion to seal) filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit(s) Opposition Brief, # 2 Exhibit(s) Appendix, # 3 Proposed Order)(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 02/11/2026)

entry.title: Entry #156 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914

entry.title: Entry #155 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER granting 153 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Andrew Cheung. Important Reminder: Unless excused for cause, an attorney who is not an ECF user must register within 14 days of the date the attorney appears in a case pursuant to LR 5.1(f) and LCrR 49.2(g).(Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 2/5/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.summary: Order on Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice

entry.title: Entry #150 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel and for Appropriate Remedy. ECF No. 146 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is referred to Judge Ray. Motion referred to Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 2/3/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #149 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: On January 22, 2026, the Court ruled on the Motion to compel except for the pending issue of Mr. Leike's documents. ECF No. 139 . The Court DENIES Plaintiffs' request to add Mr. Leike as a custodian of records that will be searched as part of the discovery in this case. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 2/2/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/02/2026)
